subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-29 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Rashid Pasha came to Haifa, but I paid no attention to him. He even sent his son to 'Akka
subcodes.first_line_orig: و هم بطمع افتادن او برای اخذ از حضور مبارک که “ در حیفا آمد باو عتنائی نشد
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
